decisions.rationale: Decouple HTTP handler from validation, media processing, connection routing, and JetStream publishing
Decouple NATS queue worker from HTTP POST execution, HMAC signing, PII compliance checks, and DLQ persistence

next_action: Align on the decomposition table for Spike 012 and begin building the schema design.
context_notes: We finished the core refactorings for Inbound Ingestion, Outbound Ingestion, and Webhook Dispatcher (all tests green and committed). We are now initiating Spike 012 to explore two-way conversational sessions.
